# Take Care of Shadow Milk - Free Virtual Pet Simulator Online

> Take Care of Shadow Milk is a free online virtual pet simulator featuring Shadow Milk Cookie from Cookie Run: Kingdom. Play instantly without download, directly in your web browser.

Take Care of Shadow Milk is a viral Scratch-based virtual pet game created by GPE_sb3. Unlike traditional pet care games, this offers complete creative freedom - you can choose to care for, play with, or playfully prank your Shadow Milk companion with no rules or restrictions.

## Game Information

- [Play Now](https://takecareofshadowmilk.cc) - Play Take Care of Shadow Milk free online game instantly
- [Game Features](https://takecareofshadowmilk.cc/#features) - Discover the amazing features of this virtual pet simulator
- [How to Play](https://takecareofshadowmilk.cc/#how-to-play) - Learn how to interact with your Shadow Milk pet

## Related Virtual Pet Games

- [Take Care of Shadow Milk](https://takecareofshadowmilk.cc) - The original viral virtual pet simulator
- [Pou Online](https://takecareofshadowmilk.cc/pou-online) - Classic virtual pet care game with feeding and nurturing
- [My DOGY Virtual Pet](https://takecareofshadowmilk.cc/my-dogy-virtual-pet) - Dog care simulation with multiple activities
- [Pet Salon](https://takecareofshadowmilk.cc/pet-salon) - Pet grooming and styling simulator
- [Pet Salon 2](https://takecareofshadowmilk.cc/pet-salon-2) - Advanced pet grooming with more features
- [My Pet Care Salon](https://takecareofshadowmilk.cc/my-pet-care-salon) - Complete pet care experience with spa treatments

## Gameplay Features

- **Creative Freedom** - No rules or restrictions, play your way
- **Shadow Milk Cookie** - Official Cookie Run: Kingdom character with unique reactions
- **Multiple Rooms** - Bedroom, kitchen, bathroom environments for different interactions
- **Drag & Drop Interface** - Intuitive pet interaction mechanics
- **TikTok Viral** - Popular social media sensation with millions of views
- **Cross Platform** - Play on desktop, mobile, or tablet devices
- **No Download Required** - Instant play in any modern web browser

## How to Play

1. **Feed Your Pet** - Drag food items to Shadow Milk and watch reactions
2. **Play & Interact** - Use toys and objects for entertainment
3. **Care & Clean** - Keep your virtual pet happy and healthy
4. **Explore Rooms** - Move between different environments for unique interactions
5. **Be Creative** - There are no wrong ways to play - experiment freely!

## About Shadow Milk Cookie

Shadow Milk Cookie is a beloved character from Cookie Run: Kingdom, known for his mischievous personality and theatrical flair. In Take Care of Shadow Milk, this character comes to life in a virtual pet simulation where players can explore the playful and chaotic side of pet ownership without any real-world consequences.

## Contact & Support

- **Website**: https://takecareofshadowmilk.cc
- **Email**: support@takecareofshadowmilk.cc
- **Game Type**: Virtual Pet Simulator
- **Platform**: Web Browser (HTML5)
- **Age Rating**: Suitable for all ages
- **Language**: English
